title: Iravaaga Nee Lyrics Idu Enna Maayam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Iravaaga Nee Song Lyrics Idu Enna Maayam
Singer(s): G.V. Prakash Kumar & Saindhavi

Karai nee penne
unai theendum azhayaai naanae.
nuraiyaagi nenjam thudikka.
ondrodu ondraai kalakka
en uyire
kadhoram kadhal uraikka.
oh oru paarvai vendum irakka
en uyire
maru paarvai podhum pirakka.

Vizhi thottadhaa
viral thottadhaa
en aanmai theendi penmai
poo pooththadhaa

Anal suttadhaa
kulir vittadhaa
adadaa en naanam
indru vidai pettradhaa.

Nee naan mattum
vazhkindra ulagam podhum.
UN thozh saayum idam podhumey.

UN peyar solli
silirkkindra inbam podhum
irandhaalum meendum pirapen.

ondrodu ondraai kalakka
en uyire
kadhoram kadhal uraikka.

Mazhai enbadhaa
veyil enbahdaa
pennae un peranbanai naan
puyal enbadhaa.

Adiyae pennae
ariyaadha pillai naanae.
Thaai pol ennai
nee thaanga vaa.

Madimel anbae
pon oonjal naanum seidhaan
thaalaatta unnai azhaippaen.

ondrodu ondraai kalakka
en uyire
kadhoram kadhal uraikka.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Iravaaga Nee?

The song revolves around themes of romance and longing, capturing the emotions of love and connection.

Who are the singers of Iravaaga Nee?

The song is beautifully rendered by GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi.

In which movie does Iravaaga Nee feature?

The song is part of the movie Idhu Enna Maayam.

When was Iravaaga Nee released?

The song was released in the year 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Iravaaga Nee from the movie Idhu Enna Maayam is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi, the melody evokes a soothing and dreamy atmosphere. The lyrics express the deep emotions of connection and yearning between two lovers. This song is perfect for moments of reflection and romance, making it a favorite for special occasions like anniversaries and weddings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Iravaaga Nee from the movie Idhu Enna Maayam. This beautiful duet by GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi captures the essence of romance and longing. Let the soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics transport you to a world of love and dreams.
stanzaMeanings: When you become the night and I become the moon, the time we spend together is happiness.
I found a friend in a moment, is this what love is? I realized it.
You are the shore, and I am the wave that touches you. My heart beats like foam. Our lives mix together, my life, to speak of intense love. I need one look to melt, and another to be reborn.
When you become the night and I become the moon, the time we spend together is happiness.
I found a friend in a moment, is this what love is? I realized it.
Did your eyes touch, did your fingers touch, did my masculinity touch, and femininity bloom?
Did the fire burn, did the cold leave, oh, did my shyness get released today?
The world where only you and I live is enough. The place where your friend rests is enough.
The joy of saying your name is enough, even if we separate, we will meet again.
Our lives mix together, my life, to speak of intense love.
Is it rain or is it sunshine, girl, your love makes me feel like a storm.
Is it truth or is it a lie, the real lie is here, is it real?
Oh girl, I am an innocent child. Like a mother, come and hold me.
On your lap, my love, I made a golden swing, I will call you to rock it.
Our lives mix together, my life, to speak of intense love.
When you become the night and I become the moon, the time we spend together is happiness.
